emails.subject: Cygnifi Derivatives Services, Inc.
emails.body: Cygnifi Derivatives Services, Inc. Kay Can you let me know if we have a confidentiality agreement with Cygnifi Derivatives Services, LLC. They are looking to enter into an agreement with Enron Credit (US). Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, EWS Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3490 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com
